title: Beat into Shape

vars.description: Forge gained per powered attack this turn
Forge reduced per hit from this card

description: Deal 5 damage. [gold]Forge[/gold] 5 for each powered attack against this enemy this turn, reduced by 5 for each hit this card deals.
upgraded_description: Deal 7 damage. [gold]Forge[/gold] 7 for each powered attack against this enemy this turn, reduced by 7 for each hit this card deals.
notes: CalculatedForge scales with the number of powered attacks made to the target this turn. The card's actual Forge mechanic involves CalculationBase (upgraded value) as a multiplier and CalculationExtra adjustment per hit from this card.
